description_long: This is a stylish pair of sunglasses featuring a bold, semi-rimless frame with a prominent browline and thin temples. The frame is primarily a warm yellow or gold color, contrasting with the dark, nearly opaque lenses that provide substantial coverage for the eyes. The bridge is a simple, dark-colored piece connecting the two lenses, with adjustable nose pads visible for comfort and fit. The temples are slender and straight, curving gently at the ends to secure the glasses behind the ears. No visible embellishments or logos are present on the frame or temples, giving the glasses a clean, classic look. The overall design is modern yet timeless, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A pair of semi-rimless sunglasses with a yellow browline frame, dark lenses, and thin, straight temples. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible logos or embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow browline, dark lenses, and the simple bridge connecting the lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, straight temple and the adjustable nose pads behind the lens.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the frame, the curvature of the temples, and the nose pads.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other temple and the frame's profile.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a semi-rimless, browline design with a thick upper section and thin, straight temples. The lower part of the lenses is rimless, while the upper part is bold and prominent. The temples are slender and curve gently at the ends, with no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark brown or black, nearly opaque, with a uniform tint and no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, straight piece in a dark color, connecting the two lenses, and is accompanied by adjustable nose pads for comfort.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a smooth finish and a gentle curve at the ends. No patterns, engravings, or decorative elements are visible.
